center.name: 喀拉拉邦
center.summary: 喀拉拉邦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括栗鸢、Greater flameback、暗灰鵑鵙等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Western Ghats in southern Kerala and southern Tamil Nadu

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: socialis, recorded in Wayanad district, Kerala]] This flameback is a species associated with a diversity of rather open forest habitat, such as found in the foothills of the Himalayas or in the Western Ghats; it also inhabits mangrove forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is restricted south of the Palghat Gap with the main distribution range in the higher regions (above ) of the Palani Hills extending into the Annamalai Hills in western Tamil Nadu and Munnar in Kerala

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It winters in the foothills, occasionally longer distances south west to northern parts of peninsular India and east to Orissa, Bengal and Bangladesh, but may travel as far south as Kerala).Taylor, B

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species is partially migratory, with the Central Asian populations migrating to India, as far as the southwest Indian coast along the Arabian Sea, to Karnataka and Kerala

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brahminy kite (Haliastur indus), also known as the red-backed sea-eagle in India, is a medium-sized bird of prey in the family Accipitridae, which also includes many other diurnal raptors, such as eagles, buzzards, and harriers, found in the Indian subcontinent, Southeast Asia, and Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in shola habitat in a small section of the Western Ghats in southwestern Karnataka and northern Kerala

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Malabar lark, or Malabar crested lark (Galerida malabarica) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in western India
